untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires detection of two descending trend lines with widening price swings and a failed partial rise. These geometric pattern features (trend line identification, swing width measurement, pattern boundary detection) cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. The signal requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic unavailable in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Entry uses support level breach (s1 via pivot points) combined with expanding volatility (atr_14 > atr_7) to approximate the breakdown through lower trend line with broadening swings. Exit uses price crossing above sma_20 as reversal signal. However, core pattern detection (descending trend lines, widening amplitude, failed partial rise) is untranslatable without trend line drawing and pattern recognition capabilities.
